ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "sector_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the company within its sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of financial metric (e.g., Revenue, Profit) */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Revenues, Profits) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric in millions of dollars */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the metric applies */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the metric value from the previous year */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the company in the FORTUNE 500 for the given metric */,
  "previous_rank" TEXT /* Previous rank of the company in the FORTUNE 500 for the given metric */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is current (true) or historical (false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type (e.g., Revenue, Profit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which financial metrics are available */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is current (true) or historical (false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the user (e.g., view Financial Metrics, edit Companies) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_rankings" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the company within its sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the ranking applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "sector", "year")
)
